case.title: FIRESTONE TIRE & RUBBER v. BD., SUPER., LOS ANGELES CTY.

opinion.h1: FIRESTONE TIRE & RUBBER v. BD., SUPER., LOS ANGELES CTY., 361 U.S. 9 (1959)
opinion.h2: FIRESTONE TIRE & RUBBER CO. v. BOARD OF SUPERVISORS OF LOS ANGELES COUNTY ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, SECOND APPELLATE
opinion.p: No. 110. Decided October 12, 1959. Appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
Oscar A. Trippet and Thomas H. Carver for appellant.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
361 U.S. 9 RYALS v. FLORIDA. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF FLORIDA, SECOND DISTRICT. No. 132. Decided October 12, 1959.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
